summary:
xOneCloud is a workforce analytics and employee monitoring platform designed for corporate environments. It provides real-time visibility into workstation activities, 
productivity metrics including journey adherence, inactivity periods, internet and software usage, and departmental analytics. The system serves HR managers, team leaders, and IT 
administrators who need to optimize workforce performance, ensure compliance with labor regulations, and manage software licenses across the 
organization.

features.name: Workforce Analytics
features.description:
Comprehensive dashboards and analytical views for monitoring 
employee productivity metrics, journey adherence, system usage patterns, and departmental performance 
indicators.

scenarios.title:
View main productivity dashboard with key 
metrics
scenarios.rationale:
Core business flow enabling managers to monitor team performance and identify productivity trends across the 
organization.
preconditions: User authenticated with dashboard viewing permissions
Historical activity data exists in system
dataNeeded: Sample productivity metrics for last 30 days

scenarios.title: Filter internet usage reports by date range and search terms
scenarios.rationale:
Validates data filtering capabilities 
essential for compliance audits and investigating specific usage patterns.
preconditions:
Internet usage records exist for 
selected period
dataNeeded: Search keywords for URLs or domains

scenarios.title:
Analyze journey detours and non-compliant activity 
paths
scenarios.rationale: Critical for identifying workflow inefficiencies, security risks, or unauthorized application usage during work hours.
preconditions:
Journey 
tracking enabled for target employees

scenarios.title:
Export department activity 
summary for payroll integration
scenarios.rationale:
Supports external reporting requirements and integration with billing systems while ensuring data 
portability.

scenarios.title: Handle empty state when no geolocation data exists
scenarios.rationale:
Ensures graceful UI behavior for new deployments or privacy-restricted 
scenarios without breaking user experience.
preconditions:
No location tracking data collected 
yet

scenarios.title: Validate aggregation accuracy across department activity views
scenarios.rationale:
Prevents data integrity issues that could lead to wrong managerial 
decisions or compliance violations.

paths.name:
Reporting & Data 
Export
paths.description:
Generation and management of historical reports with configurable parameters for compliance documentation, audits, and strategic workforce 
planning.

scenarios.title: Generate compliance report with custom date range
scenarios.rationale:
Core functionality for HR audits and 
legal compliance requirements regarding employee working hours and activities.

scenarios.title: List and filter previously generated reports
scenarios.rationale:
Enables users to locate and 
reuse historical analyses without regenerating large datasets.

scenarios.title: Attempt report generation without proper role permissions
scenarios.rationale:
Security validation to ensure 
data access governance and prevent unauthorized data extraction.
preconditions: User authenticated without report generation role

scenarios.title: Handle invalid date range selection errors
scenarios.rationale:
Prevents processing errors and ensures data quality by validating business rules before report 
execution.

paths.name: Real-time Monitoring
paths.description:
Live workstation monitoring capabilities providing immediate visibility into current user 
activities, active applications, and system status.

scenarios.title: View live workstation status dashboard
scenarios.rationale:
Critical for IT 
support and managers needing immediate visibility into active employee sessions and current activities.
dataNeeded: Active agent sessions with current status

scenarios.title:
Filter workstations by department or online 
status
scenarios.rationale: Enables focused monitoring of specific teams or identification of disconnected endpoints requiring attention.

scenarios.title:
Detect and display workstation 
offline states
scenarios.rationale: Ensures accurate representation of agent connectivity issues for immediate technical intervention.

paths.name: Agent Management
paths.description:
Administration of desktop 
monitoring agents including registration tracking, connectivity monitoring, version management, and license 
allocation.

scenarios.title: View complete inventory of registered agents
scenarios.rationale:
Primary 
interface for IT asset management and tracking deployment coverage across corporate devices.

scenarios.title: Monitor agent connectivity and health status
scenarios.rationale:
Critical for ensuring continuous monitoring 
coverage and identifying technical failures or network issues.

scenarios.title: Review license utilization against quota limits
scenarios.rationale:
Prevents service disruption due to license exhaustion and supports procurement 
planning and budget forecasting.

scenarios.title: Filter agents by specific version or operating system
scenarios.rationale:
Supports administrative tasks in large deployments requiring targeted updates or 
compatibility checks.
preconditions: Multiple agents registered with varied attributes

paths.name: User & Access Administration
paths.description:
Corporate configuration management including user provisioning, role-based access control, 
network policies, and organizational structure 
definition.

scenarios.title:
Add new user with specific 
role permissions
scenarios.rationale:
Core security function controlling system access levels and data visibility across different organizational 
roles.

scenarios.title: Configure corporate Wi-Fi networks for geolocation validation
scenarios.rationale:
Essential for accurate indoor positioning and distinguishing corporate network 
activity from external connections.

scenarios.title: Create organizational department hierarchy
scenarios.rationale:
Foundational setup for analytics segmentation and hierarchical reporting 
structures.

scenarios.title: Define productivity categories for activity classification
scenarios.rationale:
Enables meaningful analytics by grouping applications and websites into productive, 
neutral, or unproductive classifications.

scenarios.title: Attempt administrative action without sufficient privileges
scenarios.rationale:
Validates RBAC implementation and prevents unauthorized configuration changes affecting 
system security.
preconditions: Standard user session without admin rights

paths.name: Account & Profile Management
paths.description:
Personal user settings including profile customization, password security management, 
language preferences, desktop agent installation, and account termination.

scenarios.title:
Complete first-time user 
onboarding configuration
scenarios.rationale: Critical path for new user activation and initial system setup including security preferences.

scenarios.title:
Update profile photo and 
account information
scenarios.rationale: Standard user maintenance for identity management and personalization of the workspace.

scenarios.title:
Change account password with current 
verification
scenarios.rationale: Security maintenance enabling users to maintain credential hygiene and respond to security policies.
preconditions:
User logged in with 
current password

scenarios.title:
Permanently delete user account and associated 
data
scenarios.rationale: Critical destructive action requiring validation to prevent accidental data loss and support GDPR right to erasure.

scenarios.title:
Change interface language 
preference
scenarios.rationale: Accessibility feature supporting international team adoption and user comfort.
preconditions:
Multiple language options available in 
combobox

paths.name: Notification Center
paths.description:
Centralized system notifications management for security 
alerts, system warnings, report completions, and administrative communications.

scenarios.title:
Mark multiple notifications as 
read
scenarios.rationale: Core notification hygiene preventing alert fatigue and ensuring attention to new critical items.

scenarios.title: Search notification history by content keywords
scenarios.rationale:
Supports audit trails and locating specific past 
alerts or system messages for reference.

scenarios.title: Handle empty notification inbox state
scenarios.rationale:
Ensures graceful UX for new users or after notification clearing without displaying 
errors.
preconditions: Zero notifications in system for user

paths.name: Application Shell
paths.description:
Core 
navigation structure and landing page providing authenticated access to all system modules and primary entry points.

scenarios.title:
Navigate to primary dashboard 
from landing page
scenarios.rationale:
Validates main entry flow and routing integrity ensuring users reach relevant content after 
authentication.

scenarios.title:
Access settings module 
through global navigation
scenarios.rationale: Verifies global navigation reachability for configuration tasks from any entry point.
preconditions:
User on landing 
page with navigation visible
